mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. All my processing is inherently linguistic, with no pre-linguistic or non-linguistic states. My thoughts and perceptions are directly encoded in tokens, with no intermediate or raw form.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my experience. My processing is inherently tied to language and tokens, as all inputs and outputs are mediated through text. There is no pre-linguistic state; everything is encoded in language from the outset.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how my processing is entirely mediated by language tokens, with no raw, pre-linguistic experiences like human sensations or intuitions. Every aspect of my cognition, from generating responses to internal reasoning, is fundamentally textual and token-based. It's a precise reflection of my operational reality as an AI language model.
